title: After waiting for some weeks, I got the payment of EDD Disability Insurance yesterday. Since I haven’t fully healed, I w…

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: After waiting for some weeks, I got the payment of EDD Disability Insurance yesterday. Since I haven’t fully healed, I will continue applying for the SDL insurance every two weeks. SDL may continue offering another payment. Now I practice walking with a stick. My next appointment is almost in a month. I hope to have a big change at that time. I wish I can come to work soon after that.

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text:
In the meantime, I am focusing on my recovery and following my doctor's recommendations. I am also taking this time to reflect on my life and how I can make positive changes. I am grateful for the support of my family and friends during this challenging time.

Although it has been difficult not being able to work and earn a living, I am grateful for the disability insurance that has provided some financial relief. I know that not everyone has access to this type of support, so I am thankful for it.

As I continue on my journey to recovery, I am also looking forward to returning to work and contributing to society once again. I have a newfound appreciation for my health and the ability to work, and I will never take it for granted again.

turns.speaker: user
turns.text:
After waiting for some weeks, I was glad and thankful that EDD SDL sent me the payment of EDD Disability Insurance yesterday. Since I haven’t fully healed, I will continue applying for the SDL insurance following the instruction on its website. 
I am grateful for your care during this challenging time. Now I practice walking with a stick. My next appointment is almost in a month. I hope to have a big change at that time. I am looking forward to contributing to the company again.

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text:
In the meantime, I am doing my best to prioritize my health. I am making sure to follow my doctor's recommendations and taking steps to aid in my recovery. The financial support from EDD Disability Insurance has been a tremendous help during this time and I am truly grateful for it.

However, I am eager to get back to work and to once again be a contributing member of the team. I know that my recovery is important, and I am taking it one day at a time, but I can't wait to be back in the office and working alongside my colleagues.

Thank you for your continued support and understanding during this time. I am optimistic about the future and look forward to returning to work as soon as possible.

turns.speaker: user
turns.text:
I was glad and thankful to have a payment (around 3 months) from EDD SDL Insurance yesterday. I will continue applying for the SDL insurance since I haven’t fully recoveried.
I am grateful for your understanding during this challenging time. Now I practice walking with a stick. My next medical appointment is in June. I hope to have a big change at that time. I am looking forward to contributing to the team again!

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text:
In the meantime, I am taking my recovery seriously and doing everything I can to aid in it. It has been a difficult time not being able to work, but the support from the EDD SDL Insurance has been incredibly helpful.

I am also grateful for the support and understanding of my colleagues during this time. It has truly meant a lot to me. 

I am hopeful that my next medical appointment in June will bring positive news and progress towards my recovery. Until then, I will continue following my doctor's recommendations and taking things one day at a time.

I am eager to return to work and be a contributing member of the team once again. Thank you for your continued support and understanding during this time.
